name: workflowguard-ai
description: WorkflowGuard AI audits n8n workflow JSON files for production readiness.

scripts.generate:sample-reports: pnpm --filter @workflowguard/workflow-parser build && pnpm --filter @workflowguard/scoring-engine build && pnpm --filter @workflowguard/report-generator build && node scripts/generate-sample-reports.mjs
scripts.feedback:run: pnpm feedback:fetch && pnpm feedback:classify && pnpm feedback:digest && pnpm feedback:issues
